mapper.sql: select d.document_id, d.category_id, c.category_name, d.document_type, d.document_title, d.document_no, d.content, d.attachment_url, d.status, case d.status when '0' then '草稿' when '1' then '已发布' when '2' then '已归档' else d.status end as status_label, ifnull(r.read_status, '0') as read_status, case ifnull(r.read_status, '0') when '0' then '未读' when '1' then '已读' when '2' then '已确认' else ifnull(r.read_status, '0') end as read_status_label, d.publish_time, r.read_time, r.confirm_time, d.create_by, d.create_time, d.update_by, d.update_time from oa_document d left join oa_document_category c on d.category_id = c.category_id left join oa_document_read_log r on d.document_id = r.document_id and r.user_id = #{userId}

select d.document_id, d.category_id, c.category_name, d.document_type, d.document_title, d.document_no, d.content, d.attachment_url, d.status, case d.status when '0' then '草稿' when '1' then '已发布' when '2' then '已归档' else d.status end as status_label, '0' as read_status, '未读' as read_status_label, d.publish_time, null as read_time, null as confirm_time, d.create_by, d.create_time, d.update_by, d.update_time from oa_document d left join oa_document_category c on d.category_id = c.category_id
mapper.select:
and d.status in ('1', '2')
and ifnull(r.read_status, '0') = '0'
and ifnull(r.read_status, '0') = '2'
and d.document_title like concat('%', #{title}, '%')
and c.category_name like concat('%', #{categoryName}, '%')
and d.document_no like concat('%', #{documentNo}, '%')
order by d.publish_time desc, d.document_id desc

and d.status = #{status}
and d.document_title like concat('%', #{title}, '%')
and c.category_name like concat('%', #{categoryName}, '%')
and d.document_no like concat('%', #{documentNo}, '%')
order by d.document_id desc

select count(1) from oa_document where document_id in
#{documentId}
mapper.update: update oa_document set status = #{status}, publish_time = case when #{status} = '1' and publish_time is null then sysdate() else publish_time end, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where document_id = #{documentId}
mapper.insert: insert into oa_document_read_log ( document_id, user_id, read_status, read_time, confirm_time, create_time ) values ( #{documentId}, #{userId}, '2', sysdate(), sysdate(), sysdate() ) on duplicate key update read_status = '2', read_time = ifnull(read_time, sysdate()), confirm_time = sysdate()
